name: montage
description: Rapid montage: extract short beats from multiple clips in round-robin order and concatenate. Metadata-only operation on tracks[0] — no video encoding.

params.name: clips
params.description: JSON array of clip IDs to montage

params.name: beat-duration
params.description: Duration of each beat in seconds (default: 1.0)

params.name: offset
params.description: Start offset within each clip in clip-local seconds (default: 0.0)
